Package com.marswars.mechanisms

Class TurretMech

java.lang.Object
com.marswars.mechanisms.MechBase
com.marswars.mechanisms.RollerMech
com.marswars.mechanisms.TurretMech
All Implemented Interfaces:
SubsystemIoBase
public class TurretMech extends RollerMech
Roller-based mechanism configured for turret control.

  • Constructor Details

    • TurretMech

      public TurretMech(String logging_prefix, List<FxMotorConfig> motor_configs, double gear_ratio, double moi)
      Constructs a new TurretMech
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - String prefix for logging
      motor_configs - Configuration for the turret motor
      gear_ratio - Gear ratio as motor rotations / mechanism rotations
      moi - Moment of inertia of the turret in kg*m^2 (Simulation only)

    • TurretMech

      public TurretMech(String logging_prefix, String mech_name, List<FxMotorConfig> motor_configs, double gear_ratio, double moi)
      Constructs a new TurretMech
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - String prefix for logging
      mech_name - Name of the mechanism
      motor_configs - Configuration for the turret motor
      gear_ratio - Gear ratio as motor rotations / mechanism rotations
      moi - Moment of inertia of the turret in kg*m^2 (Simulation only)
